senses.gloss: to become high and flood over, to inundate, to overflow

examples.text: وينطلق صوت ميازيب العلاء، حاملاً تحذيرات الله وإنذاراته في حين تطمو على النفس تيارات الضيق ولجج الاضطهادات
examples.english: And the voice of the gargoyles gushed forth high, carrying the alarms of God and his warnings when they flow over the same streams of hardship and the depths of oppression.
